name: 잃어버린 정신머리를 찾아서
short_description: The main character, who was living a normal life without any other place, lost his wallet one day without noticing... Please help me find my wallet by manipulating the main character.
detailed_description:
About the game

The main character, who was living a normal life without any other place, lost his wallet one day without noticing...

Please help me find my wallet by manipulating the main character.

Characteristics

  • 2D Exploratory Adventure

  • an immersive story

  • Original illustration

It's a simple one-man production game made with RPG Maker.

It only uses the keyboard, and it's easy to play by examining objects

You can learn the story through many illustrations and lines.

The play time is short, so you can enjoy it simply, and there is one ending.

It includes some flashing scenes, violent situations, mental illness, unpleasant sound, and injury expressions.
